mapper.select: SELECT CAST(id AS text) AS id, reaction FROM preference.user_place_reactions WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND provider = #{provider} AND external_place_id = #{externalPlaceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO preference.user_place_reactions ( id, user_id, provider, external_place_id, reaction, reaction_count, source_modified_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), #{provider}, #{externalPlaceId}, #{reaction}, 1, #{sourceModifiedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE preference.user_place_reactions SET reaction = #{reaction}, reaction_count = reaction_count + 1, last_reacted_at = now(), source_modified_at = #{sourceModifiedAt} WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO preference.user_swipe_events ( user_id, provider, external_place_id, reaction, previous_reaction, source_modified_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), #{provider}, #{externalPlaceId}, #{reaction}, #{previousReaction}, #{sourceModifiedAt} )
